lead: Use the checker after you decide whether the current table should be viewed as normal or reset.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Check normal first, then compare with reset when needed.

summaryBoxes.label: Note
summaryBoxes.value: Pick the matching mode before reading the result.

factTable: Separate normal and reset before judging.
Do not mix the two routes.

sections.title: How to use
body: This page keeps the current checker rules in a readable format.
Choose the route first, then compare the result card and the summary table.

sections.title: Memo
body: When the route is unclear, use the safer side and avoid a shallow start.
This article stays close to the current checker structure.
